title: The one sentence that opened up the universe for a stranger - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Adam Brown in a conversation exploring transformative moments and their impact. The episode focuses on personal narrative and the power of a single sentence to shift perspective and understanding.
